code: const STORAGE_PREFIX='pkr:dismissed-eliminated-tournaments:';const CHANGE_EVENT='pkr:dismissed-eliminated-tournaments-change';function storageKey(userId){return`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${userId}`;}function readDismissedSet(userId){if(typeof window==='undefined')return new Set();try{const rawValue=window.localStorage.getItem(storageKey(userId));const parsed=rawValue?JSON.parse(rawValue):[];if(!Array.isArray(parsed))return new Set();return new Set(parsed.map(value=>Number(value)).filter(value=>Number.isFinite(value)));}catch{return new Set();}}function writeDismissedSet(userId,tournamentIds){if(typeof window==='undefined')return;const next=Array.from(tournamentIds).sort((left,right)=>left-right);window.localStorage.setItem(storageKey(userId),JSON.stringify(next));window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(CHANGE_EVENT,{detail:{userId,tournamentIds:next}}));}export function getDismissedEliminatedTournaments(userId){return readDismissedSet(userId);}export function isEliminatedTournamentDismissed(userId,tournamentId){if(!userId||typeof tournamentId!=='number'||!Number.isFinite(tournamentId))return false;return readDismissedSet(userId).has(tournamentId);}export function dismissEliminatedTournament(userId,tournamentId){if(!Number.isFinite(tournamentId))return;const dismissed=readDismissedSet(userId);if(dismissed.has(tournamentId))return;dismissed.add(tournamentId);writeDismissedSet(userId,dismissed);}export function watchDismissedEliminatedTournaments(userId,listener){listener(readDismissedSet(userId));const notify=()=>listener(readDismissedSet(userId));const onStorage=event=>{if(event.key===storageKey(userId)){notify();}};const onCustomChange=event=>{const detail=event.detail;if((detail===null||detail===void 0?void 0:detail.userId)===userId){listener(new Set(detail.tournamentIds));}};window.addEventListener('storage',onStorage);window.addEventListener(CHANGE_EVENT,onCustomChange);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('storage',onStorage);window.removeEventListener(CHANGE_EVENT,onCustomChange);};}
